case_title: LINDA BOZZO VS. DAVID M ROSENFIELD et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JEROD HENDRICKSON RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOZZO, LINDA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOZZO, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSENFIELD, DAVID M DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 -5TH AVENUE, APT. #8, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118, LEASE FORFEITED, -AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOZZO, LINDA ON DEFENDANT ROSENFIELD, DAVID M DOES 1 TO 10
